benchmark_type: Smart backend parameter sensitivity over private local Obsidian vault; public aggregate metrics only
primary_sensitivity_view: K by per-channel, collapsed over neighbor-seeds because neighbor-seeds had no measurable Smart-only effect in this snapshot.

neighbor_seed_diagnostic.interpretation: neighbor-seeds is a graph-neighbor expansion knob, but Smart-only channel results in this snapshot did not expose links/backlinks that changed the merged ranking.

privacy: Raw queries, note paths, snippets, and gold note identifiers are not published.
